title: Mob Drops and XP
quickAnswer: Mob drops are best understood by category: utility drops like bones or string, progression drops like blaze rods or ender pearls, and rare drops that benefit heavily from Looting.
keyFacts: Common farm targets include creepers for gunpowder, skeletons for bones and arrows, endermen for pearls, and blazes for rods.
Looting improves many item drop counts and can increase odds for some rare drops, but it does not multiply every drop equally.
XP value varies by mob, so the best item farm is not always the best experience farm.
commonMistakes: Building a farm for one item when villager trading or structure loot would get that resource faster.
Assuming Looting affects every kill source, including environmental kills, the same way.
